verdict: This dual-purpose formula treats salicylic acid as an exfoliant while the masque base provides occlusion and hydration. Versatility allows use as leave-on serum or 10-minute mask, broadening application scenarios.

_research.name: Salicylic Acid 2% Masque Serum
_research.con: Mixing treatment and masque functions dilutes both benefits compared to dedicated products.
